ehr_context.past_history_summary: Synthetic adult with hypertension, hyperlipidemia, and prior anxiety diagnosis. Prior chest discomfort workup two years ago was non-ischemic.
historical_diagnostics: Prior ECG from a previous visit showed normal sinus rhythm without ischemic changes.
Prior outpatient stress test was reported low risk in historical chart summary.
prior_consult_notes: Historical cardiology note advised risk-factor control and ED evaluation for exertional chest symptoms.

triage.triage_note: Synthetic patient reports two hours of intermittent central chest pressure after walking upstairs, with mild nausea. No syncope. No focal neurologic deficits.
